user_query: I'm organizing a school field trip to Washington, D.C. and I need information about the academic performance of schools in the area.

TaskList.description: Retrieve data about the academic performance of schools in Washington, D.C. using the 'DCPS Project' tool.
Retrieve information about the subjects offered by schools in Washington, D.C. using the 'DCPS Project' tool. This step depends on the completion of step 1 for local context.
Provide contact details of available speakers for educational events using the 'hellonext' tool.
